metadata.title: QuickAdd
metadata.description: Quickly add new pages or content to your vault.

regex.source: description:"Migrate to macro ID from embedded macro in macro choices."
regex.target: description:"从宏选项中的嵌入式宏迁移到宏ID。"

regex.source: description:"Use QuickAdd template folder instead of Obsidian templates plugin folder / Templater templates folder."
regex.target: description:"使用QuickAdd模板文件夹，而不是Obsidian模板插件文件夹/Templater模板文件夹。"

regex.source: description:"'Increment file name' setting moved to 'Set default behavior if file already exists' setting"
regex.target: description:"“增量文件名”设置移动到“如果文件已存在，则设置默认行为”设置"

regex.source: description:"Mutual exclusion of insertAfter and writeToBottomOfFile settings. If insertAfter is enabled, writeToBottomOfFile is disabled. To support changes in settings UI."
regex.target: description:"insertAfter和writeToBottomOfFile设置的互斥。如果启用insertAfter，则禁用writeToBottomOfFile。支持设置UI中的更改。"

regex.source: description:"Set version to the current plugin version."
regex.target: description:"将版本设置为当前插件版本。"

regex.source: description:"Add default AI providers to the settings."
regex.target: description:"将默认AI提供程序添加到设置中。"

regex.source: text:"Choose folder when creating a new note"
regex.target: text:"创建新笔记时选择文件夹"

regex.source: .setName("Create in same folder as active file")
.setName("Set default behavior if file already exists")
regex.target: .setName("设置文件已存在时的默认行为")
.setName("好的，请提交需要翻译的英文文本。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Create the file in the specified folder. If multiple folders are specified, you will be prompted for which folder to create the file in.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在指定的文件夹中创建文件。如果指定了多个文件夹，系统将提示您在哪个文件夹中创建文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Get prompted to choose from both the selected folders and their subfolders when creating the note.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在创建笔记时，提示从所选文件夹及其子文件夹中选择。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Creates the file in the same folder as the currently active file. Will not create the file if there is no active file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在与当前活动文件相同的文件夹中创建文件。如果没有活动文件，将不会创建文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Append link to created file to current file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将已创建文件的链接附加到当前文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set default behavior rather then prompting user on what to do if a file already exists.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置默认行为，而不是在文件已存在时提示用户。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Split your editor and open file in new split.")
regex.target: .setDesc("拆分编辑器并在新拆分中打开文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Focus the opened tab immediately after opening")
.setDesc("File to capture to. Supports some format syntax.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于Capture的文件,支持某些格式语法。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Put value at the bottom of the file - otherwise at the ${this.choice?.captureToActiveFile?"active cursor location":"top"}.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`将值放在文件底部——否则放在${this.choice?.captureToActiveFile?"活动光标位置":"顶部"}。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a link on your current cursor position, linking to the file you're capturing to.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在当前光标位置添加一个链接，链接到捕获文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Insert capture after specified line. Accepts format syntax.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在指定行之后插入捕获,接受格式语法。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Insert the text at the end of the section, rather than at the top.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将文本插入部分的末尾,而不是顶部。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enabling this will insert the text at the end of the section & its subsections, rather than just at the end of the target section. A section is defined by a heading, and its subsections are all the headings inside that section.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用此选项将会在节及其子节的末尾插入文本，而不仅仅是在目标节的末尾。节由标题定义，其子节是该节内的所有标题。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Creates the 'insert after' line if it is not found.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果没有找到，则创建 '插入到后面' 行。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Open the file that is captured to.")
.setDesc("Open the file that is captured to in a new tab.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在新面板中打开捕获的文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enabling this will have the assistant use the prompt template you specify. If disable, the assistant will ask you for a prompt template to use.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用此选项后，助手将使用您指定的提示模板。如果禁用，助手将向您询问要使用的提示模板。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The model the AI Assistant will use")
regex.target: .setDesc("人工智能助手将使用的模型")

regex.source: .setDesc("The name of the variable used to store the AI Assistant output, i.e. {{value:output}}.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于存储AI助手输出的变量名称，例如{{value:output}}。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The system prompt for the AI Assistant")
.setDesc("Show advanced settings such as temperature, top p, and frequency penalty.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示高级设置，如温度、top p 和频率惩罚。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Sampling temperature. Higher values like 0.8 makes the output more random, whereas lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic. The default is 1.")
regex.target: .setDesc("采样温度。较高的值（如0.8）会使输出更加随机，而较低的值（如0.2）会使输出更加集中和确定。默认值为1。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Nucleus sampling - consider this an alternative to temperature. The model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. 0.1 means only tokens compromising the top 10% probability mass are considered. The default is 1.")
regex.target: .setDesc("核采样 - 可视为温度的一种替代方案。模型会考虑具有 top_p 概率质量的令牌结果。0.1 表示仅考虑前 10% 概率质量的令牌。默认值为 1。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim. The default is 0.")
regex.target: .setDesc("正值会根据现有文本中已有的频率对新令牌进行惩罚，降低模型逐字重复同样行的可能性。默认值为 0。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics. The default is 0.")
regex.target: .setDesc("正值会根据新令牌是否出现在文本中对其进行惩罚，增加模型讨论新主题的可能性。默认值为 0。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The API Key for the AI Assistant")
.setDesc("The default model for the AI Assistant")
.setDesc("Path to your folder with prompt templates")
.setDesc("Show status messages from the AI Assistant")
.setDesc("The default system prompt for the AI Assistant")
.setDesc("Display release notes when a new version is installed. This includes new features, demo videos, and bug fixes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示新版本的发布说明。包括新功能、演示视频和错误修复。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use multi-line input prompt instead of single-line input prompt")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用多行输入提示而非单行输入提示")

regex.source: .setDesc("Path to the folder where templates are stored. Used to suggest template files when configuring QuickAdd.")
regex.target: .setDesc("存储模板的文件夹路径。用于在配置 QuickAdd 时建议模板文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This prevents the plugin from making requests to external providers like OpenAI. You can still use User Scripts to execute arbitrary code, including contacting external providers. However, this setting disables plugin features like the AI Assistant from doing so. You need to disable this setting to use the AI Assistant.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这可以防止插件向OpenAI等外部提供者发出请求。您仍然可以使用用户脚本执行任意代码，包括联系外部提供商。但是，此设置会禁用AI助手等插件功能。您需要禁用此设置才能使用AI助手。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add QuickAdd icon to the sidebar ribbon. Requires a reload.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在侧边栏丝带中添加 QuickAdd 图标。需要重新加载。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The string used to join multiple LLM responses together. The default is a newline.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于将多个 LLM 响应组合在一起的字符串。默认值是换行符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The string used to separate chunks of text. The default is a newline.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于分隔文本块的字符串。默认为换行符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The maximum number of tokens in each chunk, calculated as the chunk token size + prompt template token size + system prompt token size. Make sure you leave room for the model to respond to the prompt.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每个块中的最大令牌数量，计算方式为块的令牌大小 + 提示模板的令牌大小 + 系统提示的令牌大小。确保留出空间让模型能够对提示作出回应。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Merge chunks together by putting them in the same prompt, until the max tokens limit is reached. Useful for sending fewer queries overall, but may result in less coherent responses.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将片段合并到同一提示中，直到达到最大令牌限制。这有助于减少总体查询次数，但可能导致响应不够连贯。")
.innerText=`令牌计数: ${this.systemPromptTokenLength!==Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY?this.systemPromptTokenLength:"选择一个模型进行计算"}`
